title: ++CHRCH Access
section: THE BOOK OF GENESIS: How To Reclaim Your Artistic Brain
body_html:
The Best Way To Use The Mystery School

Achieving excellence is fun.

Three things to do before we start the journey (do them as you read this so you don't forget):

  1. Join ++CHRCH, my invite-only interactive community: GET INVITE HERE — This will help you connect with other TMS artists for accountability.
  2. Also, make sure you're getting the TMS initiation emails (#1-5). That's a big part of the experience. Those emails will help you design the perfect journey for yourself. Check your spam folder if you're not getting them.
  3. Send me your @ on Instagram so I can add you to my private IG stories. You'll get first access to new podcasts and videos from here. Hit the bell notification on @bronques so you never miss anything.
  4. Scroll down to the bottom of this module and say "hi" in the comments. Be human ✨

As for the correct order to do these modules...

There is no "correct order".

Jump around if you want. Totally cool.

Get a "lay of the land" if that's what will inspire you.

Btw, the ones with a 🔑 are modules you should keep coming back to. They will mean different things to you at different points in your journey. Third of fourth time around is when people really "get it".

The Mystery School is based on timeless principles, so it will take on a layer of depth every time you go through the modules. Don’t just read through it. Don't just watch videos. Study it.

My job is to keep giving you keys to try as you go through different doors.

Some keys that maybe didn’t work the first time around may work the second or third. 


Or, you can go through it from top to bottom, like a book. That's cool too. (Which is fun since it does follow a logical order).


But remember THIS at all costs:


Too much information kills your intuition.


I know this may seem like a weird statement coming from me-- especially inside an "online course", right?

But The Mystery School is NOT about giving you a bunch of information.

That’s not what we do here.

The Mystery School was designed to help you gain knowledge.

And knowledge comes from DOING.

You know you’re on the right track when you read or watch something inside the school and you get so excited that you go apply it right away.

Stop in the middle if you have to— the videos and essays aren’t going anywhere.

You have to strike while the iron is hot. Because motivation is fragile. It could easily disappear.

Absorbing this information without action won't get you closer to your goals.

But DOING, and ITERATING... That’s what will get you closer.

After ACTION in the real world-- come back to The Mystery School again and you will see things you read before take on new meaning. You'll get new a-ha moments that could have only come from DOING

Re-read old modules and you will see a layer of depth you didn't catch the first time.

Or watch how the module I upload that week turns out to be the "perfect module" that answers the questions that have been nagging you all week. That's not coincidence. It's synchronicity.

When you and I talk over email or through Skype, we will have more powerful conversations because your challenges will come from your recent EXPERIENCE... Not from you WONDERING "what will happen if something doesn't work"... That's just you overthinking.

Study. Go do. And then study some more... But now with just a little bit more experience under your belt.

This cyclical feedback is what will lead to transformation in record time.

Action.

Reflection.

More action.

Etc...

And remember this too:


These are TOOLS not RULES.


While yes, it's true that The Mystery School is based on timeless principles and strategies (and NOT "hacks" and "tactics" that are valid for only a few weeks like what you see on YouTube)...

The way to use everything here is as a strong foundational STARTING POINT. There is no such thing as the final word.

Think of each module as IF / THEN statements that could unlock your potential.

IF your art isn't connecting with people... THEN maybe it's because you don't have a message.

IF you're sick of Instagram and don't feel like it's working for you... THEN maybe you should try using something radically different like EMAIL to connect to your fans.

IF you're not making progress in the multiple avenues you're going down... THEN try focusing on only ONE thing for 90 days and see if that gives you a breakthrough.

Get it?

Everybody’s path is unique. And so is yours. These short films, essays and weekly emails should feel like they're giving you an unfair advantage... Not stressing you out. Take the parts that serve you... And ignore the rest. Find the nuggets of inspiration that help you get to YOUR destiny faster.

Fall in love with this journey... The process... And you'll already feel successful. And the financial and social rewards will come right behind.

Don't just read. Study.

The best information is it’s own sequel. Each time you experience it, it’s like you’re learning something new.

Then act.

Whatever you READ in the mystery school is only an idea, or concept, until you discover it’s truth for yourself.

And that can only come with relentless obsessive action.

It’s action that brought me to these conclusion.

Thousands of hours of action.

Learning from my own actions and other successful people I've worked with have paved the way to make it way easier for you to go further, faster.

But you still need to reverse engineer these concepts with action.

That’s the only way to make them your own. 

Use The Mystery School to accompany you while you focus and achieve your goals (until the rest of the world finally catches up to what you're scheming).

With that in mind... Let's dive in!


Here's a light breakdown of the sections to help you navigate the ever increasing wealth of videos and essays:


THE DEVELOPMENT PHASE:

• THE ART OF DISCIPLINE "The Book Of Transformation" -- Discover my road-tested approach to personal transformation -- Powerful enough for entrepreneurs and athletes... But Made For Creatives™. Start applying these intense techniques to turn your limp habit of procrastination into the rarefied air of God Momentum!


• OVERTHINKERS ANONYMOUS "The Book Of Mental Health" -- The opposite of overthinking is FLOW. This section is here to keep you remind of that fact. Oh, you'll fall off. It's law. But use this section to make sure those moments are just a blip in the journey not big chunks of your precious youth.


• MAKING YOUR LIFE A WORK OF ART "The Book Of Dares" -- When you repeatedly come out of your comfort zone and share it with your community, it inspires them. You’ve already been doing it. Here in there... Randomly. But the moments are few and far in between. This section will show you how to do it deliberately. Until it’s a way of life.


THE 'READY FOR THE WORLD' PHASE

• FINDING YOUR MESSAGE "The Book Of Purpose" -- If you've been searching for a guide to help you unearth your purpose... Here it is: The exclusive 7-day 'Drill Down Method'. (With downloadable resources so you can do it with a friend - highly recommended.)


• BRAND VOODOO "The Book Of Influence” -- Learn all the "extreme productivity" ninja methods that I've been using for the last 10 years to create staggering amounts of culture-defining artistic content for brands and artists like The Weeknd, Redbull, Converse, 2 Super Bowls, and The Hakkassan Group. 


• BUSINESS ART "The Book Of Money” -- How to make a living from your craft without having to "sell out". Learn the exact, copyable, process that I used to build lastnightsparty™ from nothing... Into a world-renowned brand.


3 TENETS OF 'THE MYSTERY SCHOOL' (You'll learn more later.)

1. Put a hoodie over your head. Ignore The World. Work on something that will make someone else's life better one day.

2. Be intentional.

3. Drop Bombs


At the end of each section you will find a module called "THE PODCASTS". This is all the podcasts so far organized into the proper section so you can STAY IN THE ZONE...

Lesson Summary

Before embarking on the journey towards excellence, here are three important tasks to complete:

  • JOIN ++CHRCH, The Mystery School's interactive online community.
  • Ensure you are receiving the MS initiation emails (#1-5) to enhance your experience.
  • Send your Instagram handle to be added to private IG stories for early access to podcasts and videos.

When engaging with the modules, remember that there is no specific order to follow. Feel free to jump around or explore as you please, taking note of the 🔑 modules for revisiting. The Mystery School is built on timeless principles, requiring active engagement rather than passive consumption.

Key points to remember:

  • Too much information can hinder intuition.
  • Action and iteration are essential for progress.
  • Tools provided should be seen as a starting point, not rigid rules.

Throughout the journey, study, apply, and reflect on the materials provided. The optional order of viewing the modules can bring new insights and a-ha moments with each repetition. Remember that everyone's path is unique, and you should tailor the lessons to your own journey.

As you progress, make sure to utilize the tools effectively to gain an unfair advantage in reaching your goals. The focus should be on personal growth and action, not solely on reading or watching content.

Lastly, embrace the process and fall in love with the journey, allowing the financial and social rewards to naturally follow your dedication and commitment. Let the information guide you towards transformation through consistent action and reflection.

In summary, The Mystery School offers a framework for personal development, productivity, and financial success, emphasizing action, reflection, and individualized approaches to growth and achievement.

Complete and Continue

                            Hi! My name is Dylan and I'm from the Netherlands. I live in a small town called Leiden (birthplace of Rembrandt). I am an artist who writes and directs theatre shows and films, and I also make performance artworks. But I also enjoy photography and drawing. 2025 was a great year for me as an artist. But now I want to step up my game. I've learned through meditation that this moment, right here and now, is where flow and creativity live. I've learned that by being honest through my art, people started liking my work, and sometimes it even felt like I've changed their view of life for a moment or gave them some recognition. But after a good year, I still block myself from making new connections because I sometimes make up stories in my head—that I'm not good enough. I sometimes still tell myself stories that my work is too silly or not good enough. I've been listening to your podcasts for a couple of years now, and I subscribed because I really want that extra discipline and motivation to take my work to the next level and be a full-time artist.

                                      João Falcão
                                      3 months ago
                                      Reply
                                      Link
                                      What's up everyone. This is IAMSVRREAL. João Falcão, if you want to call me by my official name. If this isn't your first time here, then I have an important question to ask you. So stick around until the end if you're curious. This is the 3rd time I'm joining The Mystery School. I am a visual artist, musician, and designer from Portugal. I have a symbol I created with just 8 years old. I use it as the image, brand, and identity behind everything I do. It's the one on my profile picture. I resent discipline and predictability. When things are the same for too long, I tend to spin things around. Multiple times throughout my 4 year journey as an artist, I clashed with many of Father's ideas. Mainly because I treated them as rules, not tools. I was in and out of this community. There were moments when it was crucial for my career. In other moments I resented its ideology. I have spent the last 6 months physically sick, even though every body scan and blood work comes out positive. I can only conclude that after finishing college last year, spending more time isolated at home, and not being able to act on my goals and projects, I repressed too much of my anxiety and worries. It reflected on my body. So that's why I am back. It's time for me to build some discipline. To get a cool creative job that supports my craft, instead of another job at a shopping mall, until I can live from my art. To release that album, to host that listening party, to make another exhibition, to get closer to who I am as a creative. It's time I ask for some help. I don't think I'll stick around forever. But this time, I'll use TMS as an acceleration boost. Now, the question I had for everyone that isn't a newcomer. I am looking for new ways to go through the TMS "course". I used to go through the modules in a linear form, from first to last, not jumping around to much. What's your way of going through it? Leave your answers below. And thank you for your attention. 2026 will be a fucking great year. I'm sure. Take care everyone.
                                      Ashris Choudhury

                                              4 months ago

                                              Hello! I'm Alexandra. I am a 41 year old dancer, dance teacher and event creator living in Portland, Oregon. I see a lot of posts here saying I am ready to make my living from my art again. It made me reflect when I was making my living completely from my art, and how those days feel different than these days. I feel that though, too, when will I return to my former self? And the answer is never. And I don't want to - still creating my new self, and aren't we all? currently, I am creating aqua dance events for people to find healing dancing together in warm water pools. I have been researching doing my first ever retreat. The mystery school prompts for daily practice got me into finally asking some venues that I was putting in the low burner of my inbox. It's very easy for me to practice dancing, not always so enthusiastic about the marketing. I am not yet sure what my creative goal is this year - it may be to do the retreat, but something else feels brewing. I spent a lot more time since the pandemic teaching than performing. I almost feel that a lot of performance I encounter is so old skool. I am really excited to go back to Bacalar Mexico this year and dance in the lagoon for a festival there. I really love helping people connect through dance. I always dreamt of helping people find the love of their life through my dance events. That may have to be a multi-day event or even multi-month. I am much more into interactive art, than sit in a chair and watch me dance shows. I still get excited about all the different hot springs that the west coast of USA has along mountainous areas. I feel angry when i listen to the news a lot and then I just turn it off for a long time and think about what art to make in reaction. I am not making art in reaction to it at present. I am offering healing. You can find me on IG/FB @alexandraluciadance .
